dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7472 IH: To amend title 38, United States Code, to repeal a certain limitation on the receipt of assistance under both the Department of Veterans Affairs Veteran Readiness and Employment program and Department of Veterans Affairs educational assistance programs.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Peters (for himself, Mr. Rutherford, and Mr. McGarvey) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to repeal a certain limitation on the receipt of assistance under both the Department of Veterans Affairs Veteran Readiness and Employment program and Department of Veterans Affairs educational assistance programs.

section.header: Repeal of certain limitation on receipt of assistance under both Department of Veterans Affairs Veteran Readiness and Employment program and Department of Veterans Affairs educational assistance programs
section.text: Section 3695 of title 38, United States Code, is amended—
